title: Dirt Mod
description: Dirt Mod expands the possibilities of dirt in Minecraft, introducing a range of dirt-based blocks, tools, and armor, along with an entirely new dimension to explore.
body:
## **Introducing the Dirt Mod for Minecraft 1.20.1**

Dirt Mod expands the possibilities of dirt in Minecraft, introducing a range of dirt-based blocks, tools, and armor, along with an entirely new dimension to explore. Whether you’re building, crafting, or adventuring, Dirt Mod brings new life to one of the game’s most common resources.

![a dirt house](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3152974050d7f396bc172a0a111afea7486b4745.png)
- **Blocks:** Dirt Stairs, Slabs, Walls, Fences, Doors, Buttons, etc.
- **Tools:** Dirt Axe, Pickaxe, Shovel, Sword, Hoe.
- **Armor:** Full Dirt Armor set (supports vanilla armor trims).
- **Items:** Diamond Shard (used to light the Dirt Portal).
- **Misc:** Dirt Portal to the Dirt Wasteland Dimension.

This mod was developed for use on [Shalz](https://www.youtube.com/@Shalz) and [theomonty](https://www.youtube.com/@theomonty)'s Re:Create Server.
